nasb.text: O Lord, for Your servant’s sake, and according to Your own heart, You have wrought all this greatness, to make known all these great things.

esv.text: For your servant’s sake, O Lord, and according to your own heart, you have done all this greatness, in making known all these great things.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊，為了你僕人的緣故，也是按著你的心意，你行了這一切大事，為要使人知道這一切大事。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，你按照自己的心意为仆人成就这大事，并显明出来。
